title: Present automotive products and services for sale
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Present automotive products and services for sale demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Maximise presentation of sales area

pcs.text: Define stock presentation area from floor and display plan, observation of space available and work instructions 1.2 Determine and present minimum product numbers and types according to workplace procedures1.3 Prepare ancillary display materials to enhance presentation of stock1.4 Keep stock display areas clean, tidy and safe1.5 Use handling, storage and display techniques according to product types, workplace procedures and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define stock presentation area from floor and display plan, observation of space available and work instructions 1.2 Determine and present minimum product numbers and types according to workplace procedures1.3 Prepare ancillary display materials to enhance presentation of stock1.4 Keep stock display areas clean, tidy and safe1.5 Use handling, storage and display techniques according to product types, workplace procedures and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define stock presentation area from floor and display plan, observation of space available and work instructions 1.2 Determine and present minimum product numbers and types according to workplace procedures1.3 Prepare ancillary display materials to enhance presentation of stock1.4 Keep stock display areas clean, tidy and safe1.5 Use handling, storage and display techniques according to product types, workplace procedures and safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Maximise presentation of sales area

elements.title: Display individual products

pcs.text: Determine display requirements from workplace instructions2.2 Source product to be displayed according to workplace procedures2.3 Display product to maximise market appeal according to workplace procedures 2.4 Prepare and locate display labels, price tickets and ancillary materials with product2.5 Monitor product condition during display period and take action to maintain market appeal according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine display requirements from workplace instructions2.2 Source product to be displayed according to workplace procedures2.3 Display product to maximise market appeal according to workplace procedures 2.4 Prepare and locate display labels, price tickets and ancillary materials with product2.5 Monitor product condition during display period and take action to maintain market appeal according to workplace procedures?

elements.title: Review effectiveness of presentation area

pcs.text: Seek feedback on display and presentation area from customers 3.2 Determine and undertake action to improve presentation of stock and area within scope of own role
